LAW AND MOTION 302, THE PETITION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE DISCOVERY OF THE DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT DID NOT FILE A TIMELY WRITTEN ANSWER OR OTHER RESPONSE TO THE PETITION OR RESPOND TO THE COURT'S JULY 15, 2019 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. RESPONDENT THE BAY CLUBS COMPANY, LLC SHALL RESPOND TO DFEH'S FIRST REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND COPYING AND FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 10 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re Compliance With Dfeh'S Investigative Discovery Demands - Response Due Jul-22-2019
Off Calendar Jul-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacob Barak, Esq. 213-439-6799 of Department of Fair Employment and Housing for Petitioner.
Mark Koorenny, Esq. 805-796-7597 of Koorenny Law Firm for Respondent.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re Compliance With Dfeh'S Investigative Discovery Demands - Response Due Jul-22-2019.

The Petition to Compel Compliance with Investigative Discovery of the Department of Fair Employment and Housing is granted. Respondent did not file a timely written answer or other response to the Petition or respond to the Court's July 15, 2019 Order to Show Cause. Respondent The Bay Clubs Company, LLC shall respond to DFEH's First Request for Inspection and Copying and First Set of Special Interrogatories within 10 days of service of the Court's Order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
